nodes.name: Outcome: Evri result
nodes.notes: Ops-facing form to record the 28-day Evri outcome for a claim. Drives the claim Raised -> Accepted/Rejected/DOR on the Attio board.

parameters.formDescription: Record the 28-day Evri outcome for a claim.

values.placeholder: optional; defaults to ceiling on Accept

nodes.name: Build outcome payload
nodes.notes: Maps the form labels to the /outcomes/ingest body {barcode, claim_status, settlement_amount?}.

nodes.name: POST /outcomes/ingest
nodes.notes: Calls the FastAPI agent. Set AGENT_BASE_URL (or edit the URL) to the public agent URL (tunnel/Render).
